name: FullStory
description: Monitor FullStory session replay and analytics for user data handling and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to FullStory at https://app.fullstory.com
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API Keys
3. Generate a Server API key
4. Copy and enter it below (the key itself, no encoding needed)

credentialFields.label: Server API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in FullStory Settings → Integrations → API Keys (Server API key)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews FullStory users with access to session replay data

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies FullStory data capture policies are configured to protect sensitive user data
